case_title: ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC VS. ROWENA P BOYD

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73431220) TO PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-30-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD, ROWENA P $10,493.98 PRINCIPAL, $1,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $468.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,337.38, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-30-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73431220) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD, ROWENA P NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2024
